name: M4A1消音版 | 夜店王子
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. A bright, neon-colored animal print pattern has been applied. You said \"a few colors\", not \"the entire color spectrum\"
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 采用了明亮霓虹色的动物纹涂装。 你说要“几种颜色”，不是“整个光谱”
